title: Ubiquiti USW-Mission-Critical
description: Robust rackmount POE switch , which is ideal for deployment in critical locations of the infrastructure, that is USW Mission Critical . Thanks to three input power options, it continuously supplies connected devices even during a power outage. In addition to the usual 230V AC power supply, the switch has an integrated battery that can supply up to 368Wh of energy. Externally you can also connect a 48V battery The Switch has a total of 9 ethernet ports 10/100/1000Mbps, of which 4 ports support the 802.3at (PoE+), the other 4 ports support the 802.3bt (PoE++) and the last one is without PoE function. The total PoE budget is 120W . Another 80W is provided by a pair of standard electrical sockets on the back of the switch Management of the switch takes place in the familiar interface of the UniFi Network Application application, which can be installed on devices with Windows, macOS or Linux operating systems. You can also use ready-made solutions Device (2) Rackmount ears (16) M4 screws (6) 10#-32 screws (2) Rack rails 230V AC power cable Battery cable Needle Opener for SIM tray (4) Rubber pads
